beaches.name: Maldives Beach
beaches.description: Crystal clear water and beautiful white sand atolls in the Indian Ocean.

beaches.name: Goa Beach
beaches.description: India's most vibrant beach destination with golden sands and lively shacks.

beaches.name: Bora Bora Beach
beaches.description: Turquoise lagoons and overwater bungalows in French Polynesia.

beaches.name: Whitehaven Beach
beaches.description: Pure white silica sand along Australia's Whitsunday Islands.

beaches.name: Navagio Beach
beaches.description: A secluded cove on Zakynthos, Greece, framed by dramatic limestone cliffs.

beaches.name: Copacabana Beach
beaches.description: Rio de Janeiro's iconic stretch of sand backed by lively boardwalk culture.

beaches.name: Radhanagar Beach
beaches.description: Ranked Asia's best beach, this pristine shore on Havelock Island, Andaman, is famed for its turquoise waters and lush forest backdrop.

beaches.name: Varkala Beach
beaches.description: A stunning clifftop beach in Kerala with mineral springs, red laterite cliffs, and a serene Arabian Sea shoreline.

beaches.name: Palolem Beach
beaches.description: A crescent-shaped paradise in South Goa lined with swaying palms, calm waters, and colorful beach huts.

beaches.name: Marina Beach
beaches.description: The world's second longest urban beach stretching 13 km through Chennai, iconic for its golden sands and vibrant street life.

temples.name: Golden Temple
temples.description: The holiest Sikh shrine in Amritsar, shimmering in gold and open to all faiths 24 hours a day.

temples.name: Meenakshi Temple
temples.description: A towering Dravidian masterpiece in Madurai adorned with thousands of colourful sculptures.

temples.name: Angkor Wat
temples.description: A vast 12th-century temple complex in Cambodia — the world's largest religious monument.

temples.name: Kinkaku-ji (Golden Pavilion)
temples.description: A Zen Buddhist temple in Kyoto whose top two floors are covered in real gold leaf.

temples.name: Borobudur
temples.description: The world's largest Buddhist temple, set among the volcanic hills of Java, Indonesia.

temples.name: Prambanan
temples.description: A soaring 9th-century Hindu temple complex near Yogyakarta, Indonesia.

temples.name: Tirupati Balaji Temple
temples.description: The richest and most visited temple on Earth, dedicated to Lord Venkateswara atop the hills of Tirumala, Andhra Pradesh.

temples.name: Somnath Temple
temples.description: One of the twelve Jyotirlinga shrines of Lord Shiva, standing majestically on the Arabian Sea coast of Gujarat.

temples.name: Kedarnath Temple
temples.description: A sacred Shiva temple at 3,583 m in the Himalayas, one of the holiest pilgrimage sites in Hinduism.

temples.name: Brihadeeswarar Temple
temples.description: A UNESCO World Heritage 1,000-year-old Chola marvel in Thanjavur with a 66-metre vimana tower built without mortar.

countries.name: Japan
countries.description: Known for cutting-edge technology, ancient temples, and centuries of rich culture and tradition.

countries.name: Switzerland
countries.description: Famous for the Alps, pristine lakes, chocolate, and some of Europe's most breathtaking scenery.

countries.name: Italy
countries.description: Home to ancient ruins, Renaissance art, world-famous cuisine, and the romance of Venice and Rome.

countries.name: New Zealand
countries.description: Dramatic landscapes spanning glaciers, fiords, volcanic peaks, and endless green coastline.

countries.name: India
countries.description: India is globally renowned for its deep-rooted spirituality, vibrant cultural diversity, and iconic landmarks.

countries.name: Australia
countries.description: Australians are famous for a laid-back, highly abbreviated slang style. They love shortening words and sentences to their absolute minimums, turning everyday phrases into quick, snappy, single-word exclamations.
